title: 5 Pcs St Andrews Basket (8 Inches) | Ideal For Floral Arrangements Home Decor Events Decorations Gifting Decorative Display
features: Set of 5 Wicker Baskets – Value pack of five 8" round St Andrews baskets, perfect for florists, events, hampers, and home décor.
Leak-Proof Plastic Lining – Each basket includes a durable liner, making them ideal for fresh flower arrangements with water.
Compact Size – Approx. 20cm (8") diameter × 8cm (3.2") depth, suitable for small to medium floral displays and gifts.
Reusable & Durable – Made from sturdy woven wicker with plastic insert, ensuring long-lasting strength and repeated use.
Easy to Clean: Lightweight and easy to move, with a simple wipe-down surface for hassle-free maintenance and care.
Versatile Uses – Great for gift hampers, Easter baskets, weddings, parties, retail displays, and rustic home storage.
description: Floralcraft St Andrews Baskets – Set of 5 provide a practical and stylish solution for florists, gift makers, and event planners. Handwoven from natural wicker and lined with a durable plastic insert, these round baskets are completely leak-proof, making them ideal for fresh flower arrangements and water retention. Each basket measures 20cm (8") in diameter × 8cm (3.2") depth , the perfect size for small to medium floral displays, hampers, or decorative arrangements. Sold as a value pack of five , they are excellent for weddings, seasonal events, or retail presentation where multiple baskets are needed. Whether used for floral designs, hampers, Easter gifts, weddings, parties, or rustic home décor , these baskets are a reliable and reusable choice. Trusted by professional florists, Floralcraft baskets deliver trade-quality performance with timeless style.
